◎片　　名　Onus

◎简　　介  

　　From writer/director Alex Secker and producer Marcus Starr, makers of the award winning Follow the Crows, comes Onus, a terrifying new folk-horror inspired by classics such as The Wicker Man, Rosemary's Baby and The Shining. When trainee nurse Anna agrees to accompany her partner to see her ailing father at their country home, she worries her background will make her an outcast...
